ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrency_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cryptocurrency */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency at the given time */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency at the given time */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total volume of the cryptocurrency traded during the time period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., exchange, API) */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange where the data was recorded */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score from social media and news feeds */,
  "alert_triggered" INTEGER /* Indicates if an alert was triggered for this data point */,
  "prediction_value" TEXT /* Predicted value from machine learning models */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrency_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol representing the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the official website */,
  "whitepaper" TEXT /* Link to the whitepaper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for automated access */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for alerts, reports, and visualizations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
